title: Vanilla historical structures
description: this datapack complements the existing structures in the game.
body:
This datapack complements the existing structures in the game.


Latest version contains swamp, mangrove and shore structures: 

1. swamp ruins 
2. swamp huts
3. swamp dead trees, mushrooms, stones and pumpkins
4. mangrove huts
5. mangrove ruins
6. beach fossils
7. beach camps, masts, stones, dead corals and ruins
8. desert temples
9. desert dead trees and cacti


In the future structures will be created for other biomes.

Warning: this datapack may not generate structures in the custom biomes of other datapacks. Support for other biomes coming soon


Datapack available only for versions 1.20-1.21.3
